data.content: 1. The knot only asks to trim the duplicated Claude provider prefix in the active-view model column, but this work also changes settings UI layout/label rendering in src/components/agent-display-label.tsx, src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx, and src/components/settings-sheet.tsx. 2. It also changes runtime agent-pool behavior in src/lib/agent-pool.ts by adding new console logging and global selection histogram state unrelated to the active-view bug. 3. The targeted fix/test in src/app/beats/page.tsx and src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts look correct, and bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build passed; bun run lint was still running after several minutes, so I could not fully re-verify that gate.
